name: How do they prove my hearing loss is really from the noisy shop in Saint George?
description: Medical tests, exposure logs, and expert links to job noise levels.[9]

mainEntity.name: How do they prove my hearing loss is really from the noisy shop in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical tests, exposure logs, and expert links to job noise levels.[9]
acceptedAnswer.description: By medical evidence like audiograms showing progressive loss tied to workplace noise levels exceeding safe limits.[9] Utah ODA claims require direct causation from occupational exposure, often needing expert testimony.[1] Key factors: exposure duration/logs, baseline hearing tests, ruling out non-work causes, and employer records.[9] Collect noise measurements, coworker affidavits, and doctor opinions; submit to Labor Commission. Solid proof overcomes common denials.
